notes: NI Alicia's Keys — Alicia Keys' personal Yamaha C3 Neo grand piano, multi-sampled at 16 velocity layers. Runs in Kontakt. CC 11 (Expression) is the most useful real-time control for dynamics. NKS Quick Controls 1-8 are pre-assigned to the most useful parameters.

Expression.description: Expression — controls dynamics/velocity response in real time (essential for expressive playing)

Soft Pedal.description: Una corda (soft pedal) — shifts to softer samples

Quick Control 1.description: Close Mic Level — direct pickup microphone (bright, present)

Quick Control 2.description: Room Mic Level — ambient room microphone (natural, open)

Quick Control 3.description: Sustain Resonance — sympathetic string resonance when sustain pedal held

Quick Control 4.description: Release Noise — key-up/hammer noise level (adds realism)

Quick Control 8.description: Stereo Width — microphone stereo image width
